directions.title: Directions
directions.landInstructions: Follow the signs from the main road. Parking is available at the harbour.
directions.approachNotes: Keep a safe distance from the buoys at the entrance. Follow the marked fairway into the guest harbour.
directions.depthInfo: Minimum depth at the entrance: 3.5 metres

harbor.title: Guest Harbor
harbor.subtitle: Welcome to our guest harbour. Find pricing, charts and practical information.
harbor.ctaDescription: Get in touch to reserve a guest slip or for more information.

motorhome.title: Motorhome Parking
motorhome.subtitle: Motorhome pitches with power and facilities right by the harbour.
motorhome.powerInfo: All pitches have power outlets (230V / 16A). Electricity is included in the price.
motorhome.facilitiesInfo: Access to toilets, showers and a waste disposal station for grey water and sewage.
motorhome.checkinInfo: Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 12:00. Contact the harbour master on arrival.
motorhome.rulesInfo: Maximum stay 7 consecutive nights. Quiet after 23:00. No awnings facing the road.
motorhome.ctaTitle: Want to book a motorhome pitch?
motorhome.ctaDescription: Get in touch to book a pitch or ask questions.

history.title: Club History
history.intro: Brygge Boat Club has a long and proud history as one of the region's foremost harbour clubs.
history.foundedDesc: The club was founded by a group of enthusiastic boat owners who wanted a community centred on life at sea.
history.clubhouseDesc: The first clubhouse was completed and quickly became a gathering point for members.
history.expansionDesc: The harbour was expanded with a new breakwater and additional berths to meet growing demand.
history.modernisationDesc: Comprehensive upgrade of pontoons, electrical systems and digital infrastructure for modern operations.

merchandise.title: Shop
merchandise.comingSoon: Coming soon! We are working on a selection of club merchandise.

invoiceDrafts.title: Faktura drafts
invoiceDrafts.subtitle: Review unsent fakturas, then send or delete.
invoiceDrafts.voidBulkBody: Void {n} fakturas. Voided fakturas can be re-issued under the same category and year.
invoiceDrafts.sendOneBody: Email the faktura to {name} and stamp it as sent. This cannot be undone.
invoiceDrafts.sendBulkBody: Email {n} fakturas to their recipients and stamp them as sent. This cannot be undone.
invoiceDrafts.deleteOneBody: Permanently delete the draft faktura for {name}.
invoiceDrafts.deleteBulkBody: Permanently delete {n} draft fakturas. This cannot be undone.
invoiceDrafts.voidOneBody: Void the faktura for {name}. It will fall out of dedup so a re-issue under the same category and year is allowed.
invoiceDrafts.voidConfirm: Void this faktura? It will fall out of dedup so a re-issue under the same category and year is allowed.

faktura.title: Faktura
faktura.subtitle: Create new fakturas and review drafts, sent, and voided.

create.singleDesc: Bill one member. Member search auto-fills the recipient details.
create.groupDesc: Pick a group of members from a filterable table and issue fakturas in bulk.

draft.subtitle: Unsent fakturas. Send to email the PDF or void to allow re-issue.

voided.subtitle: Cancelled fakturas. They no longer count toward dedup, so a new faktura can be issued under the same category and year.

sent.subtitle: Fakturas already emailed to recipients. Sent fakturas can only be voided — not deleted.
sent.resendBody: Resend the original PDF to {name} <{email}>? Useful when the recipient never received the message or it landed in spam. The original sent date is preserved.
sent.reminderBulkBody: Email a payment reminder for {n} invoice(s). Already-paid rows in the selection are skipped automatically.
sent.reminderNoneEligible: No selected invoices are eligible — all are already marked as paid.
sent.regenBulkBody: Rebuild the stored PDF for {n} invoice(s) using the current club bank account. Invoice number, KID, dates, and lines stay identical. No email is sent — use "Send reminder" afterwards.

archive.title: Previous PDF versions
archive.empty: No prior versions archived for this invoice.

copyEmails.label: Copy emails
copyEmails.noneFound: No recipient emails found in the selection.

singleFaktura.title: Create faktura
singleFaktura.memberRequiredForBoatLines: Tier or boat-specific lines require a linked member.
singleFaktura.recipientRequired: Fill in a recipient name or select a member.
singleFaktura.recipientOrgHint: Use for both non-profits and ordinary businesses. The selected member becomes the contact person — the invoice is addressed to the organisation but still shows up in the contact's member portal.
singleFaktura.orgNameRequired: Organisation name is required for organisation invoices.
singleFaktura.contactPersonPlaceholder: Who the invoice should be routed to
singleFaktura.brregBankrupt: This organisation is recorded as bankrupt in Brønnøysund. Make sure you still want to invoice them.
singleFaktura.brregDeleted: This organisation was deleted from Brønnøysund on {date}.
singleFaktura.brregWindingDown: This organisation is being wound down.
singleFaktura.boatRequired: Tiered lines and boat-required lines need a boat selection.
singleFaktura.noBoatsForMember: This member has no boats registered — add one first.
singleFaktura.linesInvalid: Each line needs a description, quantity ≥ 1, and a positive unit price.

groupFaktura.empty: No members match the current filters.

pricing.kindHint: Tiered groups multiple price items in the same category and picks the row whose range covers the boat's beam or length.
pricing.applicabilityHint: Batch faktura auto-resolves the boat from the member's slip assignment, so it cannot be combined with explicit boat selection. Use "Requires boat selection" when the line should always be tied to a specific boat the admin picks.

harborMap.title: Harbor Map Editor
harborMap.subtitle: Place dock fingers and slip positions on the harbor chart.
harborMap.fingerDragHint: Click and drag on the map to draw a dock finger.
harborMap.fingerSelectedHint: Drag the endpoints to reshape, or click × to delete.
harborMap.placeSlipPick: Pick a slip from the list, then click on the map.
harborMap.placeSlipClick: Click on the map to place this slip.
harborMap.viewingHint: Read-only. Tap Edit to make changes.
harborMap.viewingDescription: Click Edit to add fingers, place slips, and edit notes. Changes save automatically.

harborMap.slipsLockedHint: Unlock to move or place slips.
harborMap.fingersLockedHint: Unlock to add or edit dock fingers.
harborMap.pickDockHint: Pick a dock above to edit its default view.
harborMap.dockNoView: No saved view yet — pick this dock and save the current view while editing.
harborMap.dockEditHint: Pan and zoom the map until the centered label sits where you want the dock label, then save the view.

journal.title: Journal
journal.confirmVoid: Are you sure you want to void this entry? A reversal entry will be created.
journal.noPeriods: No fiscal periods. Create one to get started.
journal.updatePeriodTooltip: Sync payments and invoices from Brygge into the ledger for the selected period
journal.closePeriodTooltip: Close the period so entries cannot be modified. Can be reopened later.
journal.reopenPeriodTooltip: Reopen the period so entries can be edited again
journal.tooltipEntryNumber: Sequential voucher number within the period
journal.tooltipStatus: Draft = not finalized, Posted = finalized, Voided = reversed
journal.tooltipSource: How this entry was created (manual, payment sync, bank import)
journal.rebuildInvoiceBilagsTooltip: Delete existing invoice bilags for the selected period and rebuild them with the updated per-category split.
journal.rebuildInvoiceBilagsBody: Deletes every invoice bilag (source = invoice_sync) in fiscal period {year}, then recreates them using the current per-category split. Other entries (KID matches, Vipps reconciliations, payments) are not affected. The operation can only be undone by running it again.

journalForm.title: New entry
journalForm.tooltipPeriod: Fiscal year this entry belongs to
journalForm.tooltipDescription: Short description of the transaction (e.g. 'Electricity bill March')
journalForm.tooltipAccount: Select the account code this line posts to
journalForm.tooltipMva: VAT portion of this expense (for momskompensasjon)

siteSettings.title: Site settings
siteSettings.subtitle: Club identity, board contact emails, coordinates, website URL, and the public site logo — cross-module settings used everywhere the club appears.
siteSettings.clubNameHint: Defined by the deployment; not editable here.
siteSettings.phoneHint: Shown on the Contact page when set.
siteSettings.vhfChannelHint: Shown on the Contact page when set.
siteSettings.coordinatesHint: Used for the maps and weather widget. Set this so the guest harbour, motorhome and weather pages work.
siteSettings.siteLogoHint: SVG only. Used in the navbar and on public pages — vector keeps it crisp at any size.
siteSettings.siteLogoMimeError: The site logo must be an SVG file.
siteSettings.logoSizeError: Logo must be 2 MB or smaller.
siteSettings.websiteUrlHint: Shown in the faktura PDF footer.
siteSettings.boardEmailsHint: Optional. The treasurer email is referenced in faktura PDFs so members know where to send questions.
siteSettings.treasurerEmailHint: Printed on every faktura: "Spørsmål kan sendes til kasserer på …".
siteSettings.modulesHint: Switch a module off to hide it from the public site, member portal, and admin sidebar. Existing data is preserved and reappears the moment you switch it back on.

harborSettings.title: Harbor info
harborSettings.subtitle: Content shown on the public harbor page — approach, depth, VHF channel, and the call-to-action banner.

motorhomeSettings.title: Motorhome info
motorhomeSettings.subtitle: Content shown on the public motorhome page — power, facilities, check-in instructions, rules, and the call-to-action banner.

economySettings.title: Economy settings
economySettings.subtitle: Faktura defaults, registered bank accounts, and (soon) Vipps merchant configuration — everything the accounting module needs in one place.
economySettings.fakturaLogoHint: PNG or JPEG, max 2 MB. Used on the faktura PDF (rasterized).
economySettings.logoSizeError: Logo must be 2 MB or smaller.

bankAccounts.title: Bank accounts
bankAccounts.intro: Register the club's bank accounts. The account flagged as faktura default is the one printed on every member invoice — change it here if payments need to land in a different account.
bankAccounts.useForFakturas: Use this account on member invoices
bankAccounts.cannotArchiveDefault: Promote another account to faktura default first
bankAccounts.confirmArchive: Archive account {account}? It will no longer appear in selectors but history is preserved.

bankImports.title: Bank & Vipps
bankImports.subtitle: Bank accounts and Vipps merchant numbers — view transactions by period, upload statements, and reconcile.
bankImports.bankCardDesc: CSV from your bank (semicolon-separated). Duplicate rows are skipped.
bankImports.vippsCardDesc: CSV from Vipps Portal with customer rows, fees, and payouts.
bankImports.unresolvedNotice: {n} customer(s) could not be matched to a member — posted to clearing account.
bankImports.navCardDesc: View account transactions, upload CSV, reconcile Vipps payouts
bankImports.closedPeriodsNotice: Rows from the following closed period(s) were not auto-matched: {years}. Reopen those periods if you want to book them.
bankImports.autoMatchedNotice: Auto-matched to the registered bank account (GL code {code}) based on the statement's own account number — your selection was overridden to prevent a misuploaded statement.
bankImports.reassignTitle: Reassign import to a different bank account
bankImports.reassignBody: This import is currently tagged as GL code {code}. Booked rows are migrated automatically — their journal lines are rewritten to point at the new account. Only entries in closed/locked periods or voided entries are refused.
bankImports.periodClosedNotice: Fiscal period {year} is closed — reopen it before creating the bilag.
bankImports.vippsAccountsDesc: Vipps numbers seen in imported settlement reports.
bankImports.noBankAccounts: No bank accounts configured in kontoplan.
bankImports.noRowsInPeriod: No transactions in the selected period.
bankImports.noAccountSelected: Pick a bank account or Vipps MSN to view transactions.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication for board roles and sensitive operations.
security.statusEnabledDescription: You'll need a code from your authenticator app to use the admin area.
security.statusDisabledDescription: Enable 2FA to access the admin area.
security.enableDescription: Use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator, Authy or 1Password.
security.scanDescription: Scan with your authenticator app, or enter the key manually.
security.regenerateHelp: Requires a fresh authenticator code. Previous codes stop working.
security.recoveryCodesWarning: Shown only once. Each code is single-use, for when you lose access to your authenticator app.
security.acknowledgeSaved: I've saved the codes in my password manager

errors.freshRequired: Verify your 2FA code again to continue

totpVerify.title: Verify identity
totpVerify.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app to continue.
totpVerify.modalSubtitle: Sensitive operations require a fresh 2FA code.
totpVerify.suggestRecovery: Several failed attempts? Try one of your recovery codes.

errors.invalidCode: Invalid code — check that your authenticator app's clock is correct

lineItemPicker.flatSubtitle: Same price item billed to every selected member.
lineItemPicker.tierSubtitle: Picked per member from their registered boat dimensions.

bulkInvoices.title: Generate fakturas for {n} members
bulkInvoices.flatPaneSubtitle: Same price item billed to every selected member.
bulkInvoices.beamPaneSubtitle: Picked per member from their registered boat width.
bulkInvoices.noLinesSelected: Pick at least one line from the panes above.
bulkInvoices.droppedHint: Review each affected faktura below — most often the boat's beam/length falls outside any configured price tier.
bulkInvoices.allowDuplicatesHint: By default the system skips price-item lines that already appear on a non-voided faktura for the same member and fiscal period. Enable only when you intentionally want to bill the same yearly item a second time.

errors.noSelection: Pick at least one price item or slip-rental category

totpExpiring.title: Verification expiring
totpExpiring.body: Your sensitive-action verification is about to expire. You'll be asked for a code again next time you do one.

salgsvilkar.title: Sales terms
salgsvilkar.intro: These sales terms govern purchases and services offered by {club}, including memberships, berth rentals, guest harbor and motorhome stays, event tickets, and merchandise.

parter.title: Parties
parter.body: These terms apply between {club} ("the club", "we", "us"), org.no. {orgNumber}, as seller, and the buyer ("you", "the buyer") who places an order through the club's online services or in person.

betaling.title: Payment
betaling.body: Payment is made via the channels we offer — typically Vipps, bank transfer with KID, or invoice. The amount due, payment deadline, and KID number are stated on the invoice/order confirmation. Late payment may incur reminder fees and interest in accordance with the Late Payment Interest Act (forsinkelsesrenteloven).

levering.title: Delivery
levering.body: Digital goods (memberships, berth assignments, guest harbor stays) take effect immediately upon registered payment. Physical merchandise is delivered by post or for pickup at the harbor master's hut as agreed at checkout. Expected delivery time is stated for each product.

angrerett.title: Right of withdrawal
angrerett.body: For digital services that begin immediately at your request (e.g. a guest slip booking for the same day, a confirmed member registration), the right of withdrawal lapses once delivery has started, in accordance with the Norwegian Right of Withdrawal Act (angrerettloven) §22. For physical merchandise you have 14 days from receipt to cancel without giving a reason. Contact the treasurer to use your right of withdrawal.

retur.title: Returns
retur.body: Returned merchandise must be unused and in its original condition. You cover the return shipping unless the goods are defective. Refunds are paid back to the same payment method used for the purchase, normally within 14 days of receipt of the returned goods.

reklamasjon.title: Complaints handling
reklamasjon.body: If something is wrong with the product or service, contact us as soon as possible — and at the latest within reasonable time after the defect was or should have been discovered. The deadline for complaints is two years from receipt, or five years for items intended for significantly longer use. Send complaints to the treasurer or, for harbor-related matters, the harbor master.

konflikt.title: Dispute resolution
konflikt.body: We aim to resolve any disagreement amicably. If we cannot agree, the buyer can bring the matter before the Consumer Council (Forbrukertilsynet) or the Consumer Disputes Commission (Forbrukerklageutvalget). EU consumers can use the European Commission's online dispute resolution platform at ec.europa.eu/odr. Norwegian law applies and Norwegian courts are the venue.
